About.title: About Arar Residency
About.subtitle: A premium hospitality experience in Arar
About.storyText: Arar Residency was founded with a single vision: to provide exceptional hospitality in the Northern Borders region of Saudi Arabia. Located in the heart of Arar city, we have been welcoming guests from across the Kingdom and beyond.
About.missionText: To deliver a world-class hotel experience that combines modern comfort with traditional Saudi warmth and hospitality.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about staying with us
FAQ.q1: What are the check-in and check-out times?
FAQ.a1: Check-in is at 2:00 PM and check-out is at 12:00 PM (noon). Early check-in and late check-out are available upon request, subject to availability.
FAQ.q2: Do you offer monthly and weekly stays?
FAQ.a2: Yes! We offer flexible nightly, weekly, and monthly packages. Monthly packages include special discounted rates perfect for long-term stays.
FAQ.a3: Yes, we offer free secure parking for all our guests.
FAQ.a4: Yes, high-speed complimentary Wi-Fi is available throughout the property.
FAQ.a5: We support online booking with payment options available at checkout. You can also pay upon arrival.
FAQ.a6: Yes, we offer airport pickup service. Please contact us at least 24 hours in advance to arrange.
FAQ.q7: Can I cancel or modify my booking?
FAQ.a7: Bookings can be cancelled free of charge up to 24 hours before check-in. Modifications are subject to availability.
FAQ.a8: Absolutely! We welcome families. Children under 5 stay free of charge.
